name: tempchrome
title: TempChrome
description: Launch Chromium with temporary, isolated profiles
author: alex_liao_oncloud

commands.name: launch
commands.title: Quick Launch TempChrome
commands.subtitle: TempChrome
commands.description: Create a temporary profile and launch Chromium instantly

preferences.name: autoCleanup
preferences.title: Auto-Cleanup
preferences.description: Automatically delete the temp profile once the Chromium window is closed
preferences.label: Mark profile for cleanup after Chromium closes

preferences.name: startUrl
preferences.title: Start URL
preferences.description: Open Chromium directly on this page (leave blank for the default new tab)

preferences.name: appMode
preferences.title: App Mode
preferences.description: Requires a Start URL. Emits --app=<url> instead of the positional URL
preferences.label: Open Start URL in a chromeless window (--app)

preferences.name: ignoreCertificateErrors
preferences.title: Ignore Certificate Errors
preferences.description: Skips TLS validation — use only for local dev
preferences.label: Pass --ignore-certificate-errors (insecure)

preferences.name: disableExtensions
preferences.title: Disable Extensions
preferences.description: Start Chromium without any installed extensions
preferences.label: Pass --disable-extensions on launch

preferences.name: autoOpenDevtools
preferences.title: Auto-Open DevTools
preferences.label: Open DevTools for each new tab

preferences.name: remoteDebuggingPort
preferences.title: Remote Debugging Port
preferences.description: Enable CDP on a port (1–65535); blank to disable

preferences.name: customArgs
preferences.title: Custom Chromium Arguments
preferences.description: Extra CLI flags appended to every launch (whitespace-separated)

commands.name: tempchrome
commands.title: TempChrome
commands.subtitle: TempChrome
commands.description: Launch, manage profiles, or install Chromium

preferences.name: chromiumInstallDir
preferences.title: Chromium Install Directory
preferences.description: Directory that contains (or will contain) Chromium.app. The installer places Chromium.app here; launches spawn the binary inside it.

preferences.name: tempBaseDir
preferences.title: Temp Profile Base Directory
preferences.description: Directory where temporary profiles are created
